title: Customer Refund Approval Example
description: LangGraph refund workflow with TryAgent approval and customer message review.

title: LangGraph Stock Research Example
description: LangGraph stock research workflow with TryAgent investment committee and compliance review interrupts.

title: Workflow Escalation Catalog
description: Stored workflow escalation scenarios that exercise both TryAgent SDKs against the platform lifecycle.

subject.label: Workflow escalation catalog Python SDK coverage

sampleEscalation.question: Should the workflow escalation catalog remain published as a Python SDK platform example?
evidence: The catalog stores nine workflow escalation scenarios from the product examples list.
The stored project declares Python and TypeScript SDK coverage.
The Python SDK must create, list, fetch, acknowledge, decide, and cancel example escalations against the platform contract.

choices.label: Keep published
choices.consequence: Treat the catalog as an active Python and TypeScript SDK platform example.

choices.label: Hold for review
choices.consequence: Keep the example internal until both SDK coverage checks are reviewed.

choices.label: Remove Python coverage
choices.consequence: Keep the TypeScript catalog but stop advertising Python SDK coverage.

metadata.trigger: Python SDK platform E2E coverage for stored example projects

sampleDecision.reason: The catalog now exercises the Python SDK against the same platform lifecycle as the TypeScript examples.
